text:
Once upon a time in a remote valley, there lived a wise old owl named Oliver. Every evening after dusk, he would fly down from his nest high in a towering pine and embark on a nightly quest to gather the most elusive berries in the valley – the moonshine flowers.

The moonshine flowers were so rare that only the most devoted of owl friends would ever discover them. Oliver’s companions were few and far between. There was Luna, his best friend who loved him unconditionally; Spike, a mischievous golden retriever who had a knack for finding such flowers; and Old Wilson, Oliver’s advisor.

One day, as Oliver was searching for his first batch of moonshine flowers, he stopped to admire a particularly majestic mountain overlook. From up there, the valley looked smaller and brighter than usual. Suddenly, amidst the tranquility, a small shadow darted past him.

Turning its head towards the sound, Oliver saw a young fox he’d never encountered before: Ashwick. Quiet
